mapper.select: SELECT id, name, region, sort_index FROM sa_company ORDER BY sort_index

SELECT s.id, s.company_id, c.name AS company_name, c.region, s.name, s.capacity_kwp, s.status, s.data_quality, s.sort_index FROM sa_station s JOIN sa_company c ON c.id = s.company_id ORDER BY c.sort_index, s.sort_index
